name: SkyCrypt Frontend
description: Frontend for SkyCrypt based on LeaPhant's skyblock-stats, giving players a fast profile overview with stats, skills, gear, and integrated NW calculator support.

name: SkyCrypt Backend
description: The backend for SkyCrypt, It handles, sorts and filters all the data from the Hypixel API, and presents it in a usable format for the frontend.

name: hypixel-discord-chat-bridge
description: A two-way chat bridge between Hypixel guild chat and a Discord channel. The application utilizes discord.js v14 for communicating with Discord, and Mineflayer for communicating with Hypixel.

name: SkyHelper
description: The most popular Hypixel Skyblock bot, Also worked on management and skyhelper-networth.

name: QwackScore
description: Scoring and ranking project focused on Hypixel-related metrics and comparisons.

name: QwackAPI
description: A Hypixel SkyBlock API wrapper with extended endpoints for auctions, profiles, networth, stats, and more.

name: This Website
description: My portfolio website, which your currently on!

name: Vape V4
description: This GitHub repository provides access to the cracked version of Vape V4 (v4.04 and v4.10), a popular paid cheat client for Minecraft. The Vape cheat client offers a wide range of features and tools designed to enhance gameplay and provide players with unique advantages in the Minecraft world.

name: Vape Lite
description: This GitHub repository provides access to the cracked version of Vape lite, a popular paid ghost cheat client for Minecraft. The Vape cheat client offers a wide range of features and tools designed to enhance gameplay and provide players with unique advantages in the Minecraft world while still staying ghost.
